source: Sleep and nightly recharge vectors plus shared common prototype distilled into a pre-KMP readiness manifest
description: Pins the sleep and nightly recharge behavior families that must remain covered before model conversion delegates to shared KMP code.

expected.commonDecision: Sleep and nightly recharge model migration may proceed only after every vector named by this readiness manifest is executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS sleep/nightly tests continue to reference the same vectors, nightly date/timestamp/default and malformed-payload behavior stays covered, sleep end-offset, timezone, hypnogram, cycle, enum, and partial-night optional policies remain explicit, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

notes: This readiness manifest is a migration gate for sleep and nightly recharge model behavior-family completeness only; public facade request routing and platform compatibility for current sleep offset and omitted-optional differences remain adapter decisions unless deliberately standardized.
